displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Super UV Cooling Gel Sunscreen instantly cools your skin while delivering broad-spectrum protection from UVA and UVB rays. With a fresh watery gel texture, it hydrates and refreshes your skin without leaving a white cast. Designed for all skin tones, this sunscreen provides long-lasting freshness for up to 8 hours while shielding your skin from harmful sun exposure.

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Aqua/Water, Octocrylene, Alcohol Denat., Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Isopropyl Palmitate, Silica, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glycerin, Tocopherol, Niacinamide, Dimethicone, Mica, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Triethanolamine, Xanthan Gum, Disodium Edta, Sodium Hyaluronate, Dimethylmethoxy Chromanol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Caprylyl Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Parfum/Fragrance.

metaData.Key Information: Garnier Super UV Anti-Acne Serum formulated to provide daily sun protection for acne-prone skin. Offering 12 hours of oil control and protection from harmful UV rays, it helps prevent acne and reduces sun damage. The water-resistant, non-comodogenic formula ensures no clogging of pores and is makeup-compatible for everyday use.

metaData.SAP Product Name: ANESSA BRIGHTENING UV SUNSCREEN GEL 90G

product.name: Anessa Brightening UV Sunscreen Gel

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Auto Veil Technology - Automatically repairs and smooths UV protection veil that can crease or get patchy with facial movements. Provides moisture to care for damage caused by dryness while supporting skin’s moisture-retaining power.
• Auto Booster Technology - Uniform and stronger UV protective veil when in contact with Sweat, Water and Humidity - Perfect for tropical climate!
• Aqua Booster EX Technology - Stronger UV Protection when in contact with sweat or water (proven after 80 minutes in pool)
• Friction and Sand Resistant - Sunscreen stays on skin even with friction and rubbing
• 50% Beauty Skincare Ingredients - Prevents photoaging, contains beauty ingredients that prevents vasodilation and skin oxidation caused by UV rays
• Colorant-free, non-comedogenic & dermatologist-tested
• Washes off easily with soap or daily cleanser

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Alcohol, Dimethicone, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Octocrylene, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Homosalate, Titanium Dioxide, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Glycerin, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Caprylyl Methicone, Peg-60 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Butylene Glycol, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Trimethylsiloxysilicate, Xanthan Gum, Peg/ppg-14/7 Dimethyl Ether, Peg/ppg-9/2 Dimethyl Ether, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Potentilla Erecta Root Extract, Citrus Unshiu Peel Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Soluble Collagen, Acrylamides/dmapa Acrylates/methoxy Peg Methacrylate Copolymer, Hydrogenated Palm Oil, Isododecane, Hydrated Silica, Bis-Butyldimethicone Polyglyceryl-3, Polyglyceryl-6 Polyricinoleate, Elaeis Guineensis (Palm) Kernel Oil, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Elaeis Guineensis (Palm) Oil, Carbomer, Potassium Hydroxide, Dextrin Palmitate/Ethylhexanoate, Agar, Acrylates/c10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Tocopherol, BHT, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose Stearoxy Ether, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Stearic Acid, Dextrin Palmitate, Peg-6, Sodium Metabisulfite, Silica, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance (Parfum)
metaData.Key Information: Improves the appearance of dark spots for a beautiful complexion. Moisturizes and regulates the water retention capacity of bare skin. For face & body, for all skin types, dewy fresh gel texture.

product.description:
Upgrade your body wash!
Suu Balm Creamy Body Wash (Cooling & Gentle) is ideal for gentle cleansing on sensitive and dry skin, leaving your skin feeling soothed and refreshed. This soap, sulphate, fragrance, paraben and preservative-free cream body wash is gentle, suitable for use on all skin types & especially so for sensitive skin!

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Cetyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Stearyl Alcohol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Menthol, Caprylyl Glycol, Lactic Acid, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea Butter), Betaine, Sodium Hyaluronate
metaData.Key Information:
- 100% soap & sulfate free formula
- Ultra gentle, rich, creamy texture
- Non-irritating ingredients for eczema-prone and sensitive skin
- Contains cooling menthol and 5 moisturising ingredients such as Shea Butter and - Sodium HyaluronateFormulated by the National Skin Centre, Singapore.
metaData.Preparation: Use when showering or bathing, daily or more often if needed. Apply to the body to gently cleanse, and then rinse off. Do not use if you are allergic to any of the ingredients. For best results, keep your showers short and do not use water that's too hot. After showering, pat your skin dry and apply your Suu Balm Body Care Ceramide Moisturiser Rapid Itch Relief to body regions with itch or dryness.
